raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (instruction adherence), shows where the draft drifts from it (by comparing the thesis and evidence), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (INSTRUCTSCORE, controllable MT, terminology-constrained MT benchmarks) and articulates the delta (the paper claims to be the first systematic evaluation of instruction adherence in the machine translation setting).",
    "RX.1": "Every recommendation marks uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., 'first systematic evaluation', 'first benchmark').",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the paper's scope mismatch in the data mix).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (though not explicitly in this excerpt, it is implied by the rationale provided)."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the load-bearing concept (instruction adherence), shows where the draft drifts from it (by comparing the thesis and evidence), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (INSTRUCTSCORE, controllable MT, terminology-constrained MT benchmarks) and articulates the delta (the paper claims to be the first systematic evaluation of instruction adherence in the machine translation setting).
rationale.RX.1: Every recommendation marks uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., 'first systematic evaluation', 'first benchmark').
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the paper's scope mismatch in the data mix).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (though not explicitly in this excerpt, it is implied by the rationale provided).
